mapper.select: SELECT p.policy_id, p.company_code, p.policy_no, p.policy_seq, p.change_seq, p.product_code, p.mop, p.insured_amount FROM lia_policy p INNER JOIN lia_customer c ON c.active_flag = 'Y' AND c.customer_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = CAST(p.policy_id AS CHAR CHARACTER SET utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci WHERE p.active_flag = 'Y' ORDER BY p.updated_at DESC, p.policy_no LIMIT 1

SELECT customer_id, customer_name, customer_type, id_type, id_no FROM lia_customer WHERE active_flag = 'Y' AND customer_id COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = CAST(#{policyId} AS CHAR CHARACTER SET utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci ORDER BY updated_at DESC, customer_id LIMIT 1

SELECT product_order_id, policy_no, policy_seq, product_order_no, product_code FROM lia_product_order WHERE active_flag = 'Y' AND product_order_no = 1 AND policy_no COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = CAST(#{policyNo} AS CHAR CHARACTER SET utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND policy_seq COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = CAST(#{policySeq} AS CHAR CHARACTER SET utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci ORDER BY updated_at DESC, product_order_id LIMIT 1

SELECT product_order_id, policy_no, policy_seq, product_order_no, product_code FROM lia_product_order WHERE active_flag = 'Y' AND policy_no COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = CAST(#{policyNo} AS CHAR CHARACTER SET utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND policy_seq COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = CAST(#{policySeq} AS CHAR CHARACTER SET utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci ORDER BY product_order_no, product_order_id

SELECT product_code, product_name FROM lia_product WHERE active_flag = 'Y' AND product_code COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = CAST(#{productCode} AS CHAR CHARACTER SET utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci ORDER BY updated_at DESC, product_code LIMIT 1
SELECT policy_id, pay_period_type, pay_period FROM lia_payment WHERE active_flag = 'Y' AND policy_id = #{policyId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, payment_id LIMIT 1
